summary: P1.8-3 Health Check subsystem: computeHealthCheckResults pure function with seven typed indicators, HEALTH_INDICATOR_TRACEABILITY_MAP, and 14 unit tests. No UI changes.

interfaceChanges.description: Pure function from unified_operational_data_model to typed health_check_results envelope.
Indicator→workflow traceability map for ADR-026 constraint #5.

mappings.criterion: Typed health_check_results envelope matching system-design contract
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_operations_health_check.test.ts::returns typed health_check_results with all indicator keys

mappings.criterion: One unit test per indicator with minimal fixture input
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_operations_health_check.test.ts::one unit test per indicator with minimal fixture input

mappings.criterion: Traceability test each indicator ID maps to catalog workflow
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_operations_health_check.test.ts::maps every indicator ID to ≥1 validated catalog workflow

mappings.criterion: No UI in this slice logic and tests only
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_operations_health_check.test.ts::no UI in this slice — logic and tests only under operations lib
